title: ChatGPT’s upgraded voice mode is better at shutting up
author: Emma Roth
raw_description: OpenAI is overhauling ChatGPT's voice mode with a new model that it says is more like "talking to another person." The new GPT-Live-1 is designed to interrupt you less and will also wait for you to continue speaking if you pause mid-conversation. During a press briefing, OpenAI research lead Kundan Kumar called GPT-Live-1 the company's […]
summary: OpenAI升级ChatGPT语音模式，推出GPT-Live-1模型，减少打断，支持暂停后等待用户继续说话，提升对话自然度。
analysis_note: 产品功能改进，技术深度一般，但提升用户体验，对AI语音交互领域有参考价值。
